title: Food Processing vs Nutrition Analysis
description: Analyzed how food processing levels affect nutritional value using z-score normalization and rolling averages for trend visualization.

title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: Built a responsive portfolio site with dynamic project rendering, dark mode toggle, and GitHub API integration using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

title: Matrix Multiplication Optimization
description: Optimized matrix multiplication performance using loop reordering and cache-aware techniques such as tiling and transposition.

title: EV Charging Behavior Analysis
description: Developed machine learning models to classify EV charging behavior, improving prediction accuracy by 30% and identifying efficiency differences between user groups.

title: Healthcare Data Analytics Dashboard
description: Designed SQL pipelines and Power BI dashboards to analyze patient data and visualize healthcare trends for decision-making support.

title: Power Outage Prediction System
description: Built machine learning models using Random Forest and XGBoost to predict outage duration with feature engineering and SHAP-based explainability.

title: Song Recommender System
description: Created a recommendation system based on audio features such as energy and danceability, along with interactive visualizations and a lyrics search tool.

title: Bayesian Network Income Predictor
description: Implemented Bayesian Networks on the UCI Adult dataset to model income prediction and analyze class imbalance effects.

title: RF Signal Classification for Drones
description: Worked with RF datasets to classify drone signals using machine learning and signal processing techniques for real-world detection tasks.

title: Single-Player Story Video Game
description: Designed and developed a single-player story-based video game with interactive choices, character dialogue, and a narrative-driven progression system.

title: Web Crawler in C
description: Built a web crawler in C to fetch webpages, parse links, and traverse connected pages while practicing memory management, file handling, and data structures.

title: Dinosaur Runner Game
description: Built a browser-based dinosaur runner game inspired by the Google Chrome offline game, using keyboard controls, obstacle generation, collision detection, and score tracking.
